basic_details.job_title: DCPU Chengalpattu Project Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: District Child Protection Unit Chengalpattu (DCPU Chengalpattu)
basic_details.short_information: District Child Protection Unit Chengalpattu (DCPU Chengalpattu) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Project Coordinator Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 30-07-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate degree in Social Work / Sociology / Child Development / Human Rights / Public Administration / Psychology / Psychiatry / Law / Public Health / Community Resource Management, Graduate in Social Work/Sociology / Child Development / Human Rights / Public Administration / Psychology/Psychiatry / Law / Public Health / Community Resource Management with 2 years experience, Proficiency in Computers
qualification.details: Post Graduate degree in Social Work / Sociology / Child Development / Human Rights / Public Administration / Psychology / Psychiatry / Law / Public Health / Community Resource Management from a recognized University. Or Graduate in Social Work/Sociology / Child Development / Human Rights / Public Administration / Psychology/Psychiatry / Law / Public Health / Community Resource Management from a recognized University with 2 years experience in project formulation / implementation, monitoring and supervision preferably in the field of Women & Child Development / Social Welfare. Proficiency in Computers. Preference may be given to personnel working in Emergency Helplines.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Chengalpattu Project Coordinator Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://chengalpattu.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DCPU Chengalpattu Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DCPU Chengalpattu Project Coordinator Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Chengalpattu Project Coordinator Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: http://chengalpattu.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DCPU Chengalpattu Project Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCPU Chengalpattu Project Coordinator recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Project Coordinator post is 30th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Coordinator position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate degree or a Graduate degree with 2 years of experience in relevant fields such as Social Work, Sociology, Child Development, and others as specified in the notification. Proficiency in computers is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Coordinator post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Coordinator position is 42 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules, which can be found in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Coordinator role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Coordinator post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 28,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the DCPU Chengalpattu Project Coordinator vacancy?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the notification via Speed Post or Registered Post.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Project Coordinator post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Project Coordinator in the District Child Protection Unit Chengalpattu.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Project Coordinator post is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Project Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves Document Verification. Candidates are advised to ensure all their documents are in order.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Child Protection Unit Chengalpattu, which is http://chengalpattu.nic.in.
